SELECT n, factorial(n) FROM test_factorial WHERE n >= 0;
SELECT factorial((SELECT MAX(n) FROM test_factorial WHERE n >= 0));
SELECT factorial(n) FROM (SELECT n FROM test_factorial WHERE n < 21) AS valid_inputs;
CREATE TABLE factorial_results AS SELECT n, factorial(n) AS result FROM test_factorial WHERE n BETWEEN 0 AND 20;
SELECT n, factorial(n) FROM test_factorial ORDER BY n DESC;
WITH (SELECT n FROM test_factorial WHERE n < 21) AS valid_numbers SELECT n, factorial(n) FROM valid_numbers;
SELECT factorial(n + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_factorial)) FROM test_factorial WHERE n < 20;
